import * as component_1 from '@kne/remote-loader';
import * as component_2 from 'react-router-dom';
import * as component_3 from 'lodash';
const readmeConfig = {
    name: `remote-loader`,
    summary: `<p>remote-loader 是一个面向 React 的远程模块加载工具，基于 Webpack 5 Module Federation 设计，适合将不同团队、不同发布节奏的功能模块在运行时进行组合。</p>
<h3>特点</h3>
<ul>
<li>支持 <code>RemoteLoader</code>、<code>withRemoteLoader</code>、<code>useLoader</code> 三种接入方式，覆盖声明式、HOC 与 Hook 场景。</li>
<li>支持完整的 token 语法：可按远程名、版本、子模块、属性路径精确定位到目标导出。</li>
<li>内置模块缓存与复用机制，避免重复加载，提高首屏后交互性能。</li>
<li>支持全局与局部兜底（<code>fallback</code> / <code>error</code>）能力，远程模块异常时可平滑降级。</li>
<li><code>preset</code> 支持深度合并配置，便于在不同环境下渐进覆盖远程地址与模板参数。</li>
<li>新增 <code>getGlobal</code> 用于读取当前全局配置快照，便于调试与配置诊断。</li>
</ul>
<h3>适用场景</h3>
<ul>
<li>微前端主应用按需加载业务子模块。</li>
<li>组件平台动态装配跨仓库组件。</li>
<li>需要按版本灰度远程模块并快速回滚的前端系统。</li>
</ul>
<h3>使用体验亮点</h3>
<ul>
<li>API 简洁，单个 <code>module</code> 字符串即可完成远程组件挂载。</li>
<li>在复杂场景下可直接使用 <code>useLoader</code> 获取加载状态与模块对象，易于与现有状态管理整合。</li>
<li>提供 <code>getPublicPath</code>、<code>getStaticPath</code> 等路径辅助函数，减少远程地址拼装错误。</li>
</ul>`,
    description: `加载一个webpack5生成的邦联模块`,
    packageName: `@kne/remote-loader`,
    api: `<h3>组件</h3>
<h4>RemoteLoader</h4>
<p>用于加载单个远程模块并渲染其默认导出组件。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>module</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记，格式：<code>[模块地址/remote/version:]模块名[@子模块][.模块属性]</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onLoadComplete</td>
<td>Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>加载完成回调，参数为已加载模块数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteFallback</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>preset().fallback</code></td>
<td>加载中展示内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteError</td>
<td>ReactNode | Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>preset().error</code></td>
<td>加载失败展示内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteOptions</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>{}</code></td>
<td>传递给内部 <code>loadModule</code> 的覆盖配置</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>...props</td>
<td>any</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>透传到远程组件的业务属性（可包含 JSX）</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>高阶组件</h3>
<h4>withRemoteLoader</h4>
<p>为组件注入远程加载能力。被包装组件通过 <code>remoteModules</code> 获取已加载模块数组。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>modules</td>
<td>Array&lt;string&gt;</td>
<td>是</td>
<td><code>[]</code></td>
<td>远程模块标记数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onLoadComplete</td>
<td>Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>加载完成回调</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteFallback</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>preset().fallback</code></td>
<td>加载中展示内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteError</td>
<td>ReactNode | Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>preset().error</code></td>
<td>加载失败展示内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteOptions</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>{}</code></td>
<td>传递给内部 <code>loadModule</code> 的覆盖配置</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>...props</td>
<td>any</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>透传给被包装组件</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>createWithRemoteLoader</h4>
<p>用于创建预设参数版 HOC。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>params</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>预设参数（如 <code>modules</code>、<code>remoteFallback</code>、<code>remoteOptions</code> 等）</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>(WrappedComponent) =&gt; ReactComponent</code>。</p>
<p>参数合并方式为浅合并（<code>Object.assign({}, params, props)</code>），同名字段由运行时 <code>props</code> 覆盖。</p>
<h3>Hooks</h3>
<h4>useLoader</h4>
<p>在函数组件中按需加载远程模块。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>config.modules</td>
<td>Array&lt;string&gt;</td>
<td>是</td>
<td><code>[]</code></td>
<td>远程模块标记数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config.onLoadComplete</td>
<td>Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>加载完成回调</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config.options</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>{}</code></td>
<td>传递给 <code>loadModule</code> 的覆盖配置</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>名称</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>loading</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>是否处于加载中</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>error</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>是否加载失败</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteModules</td>
<td>Array&lt;any&gt;</td>
<td>已加载的远程模块数组</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>并导出 <code>cache</code>（LRU 实例）用于外部清理或观测缓存状态。</p>
<h3>函数</h3>
<h4>loadModule</h4>
<p>加载远程模块并返回规范化结果。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>token</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>targetOptions</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>传递给 <code>getStaticPath</code> 的覆盖配置</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>Promise&lt;{ default: any }&gt;</code>。</p>
<h4>safeLoadModule</h4>
<p>安全加载版本，内部捕获异常。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>token</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>Promise&lt;any&gt;</code>，失败时返回空函数组件。</p>
<h4>parseToken</h4>
<p>解析远程模块标记。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>token</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>模块标记</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回对象字段：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字段</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>url</td>
<td>string | null</td>
<td>远程基础地址</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remote</td>
<td>string | null</td>
<td>远程容器名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>version</td>
<td>string | null</td>
<td>远程版本</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>module.moduleName</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>主模块名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>module.modulePropName</td>
<td>string | undefined</td>
<td>主模块属性名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>module.subModuleName</td>
<td>string | undefined</td>
<td>子模块名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>module.subModulePropName</td>
<td>string | undefined</td>
<td>子模块属性名</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>preset</h4>
<p>设置并合并全局配置。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>options</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>全局配置项</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>说明：使用深度合并策略（<code>lodash/merge</code>）。</p>
<h4>getGlobal</h4>
<p>获取当前全局配置快照。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>-</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>无参数</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>Object</code>（深拷贝后的全局配置）。</p>
<h4>getPublicPath</h4>
<p>根据远程容器配置生成公共路径。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td><code>remotes</code> 中的容器键名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>options</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>覆盖配置</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>string</code>。</p>
<h4>getStaticPath</h4>
<p>按模板生成静态资源路径。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>config.url</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程基础地址</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config.remote</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程容器名</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config.version</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>版本号</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config.tpl</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>否</td>
<td><code>{{url}}/{{remote}}/{{version}}</code></td>
<td>路径模板</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>string</code>（以 <code>/</code> 结尾）。</p>
<h4>getOrLoadRemote</h4>
<p>获取或加载远程容器实例。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>remote</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程容器全局名称</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shareScope</td>
<td>string | Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>共享作用域</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteFallbackUrl</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程容器回退地址</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>Promise&lt;any&gt;</code>。</p>
<h4>loadComponent</h4>
<p>创建远程组件加载器。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>remote</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程容器全局名称</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sharedScope</td>
<td>string | Object</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>共享作用域</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>module</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>模块名（如 <code>./Layout</code>）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>url</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td><code>remoteEntry</code> 地址</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回值：<code>() =&gt; Promise&lt;any&gt;</code>。</p>`,
    example: {

                    {
                        name: "user",
                        title: "用户",
                        type: "user",
                        valueOf: (item) => \`\${item.enUserName} \${item.userName}\`,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "hideInfo",
                        title: "隐藏字段",
                        type: "hideInfo",
                        valueOf: (item) =>
                            item["phoneNumber"] && {
                                loader: () => {
                                    return item["phoneNumber"] + "-" + item["id"];
                                },
                            },
                    },
                    {
                        name: "userName",
                        title: "用户名",
                        type: "userName",
                    },
                    {
                        name: "contacts",
                        title: "联系人",
                        type: "contacts",
                        valueOf: (item) => \`\${item.userName} \${item.phoneNumber}\`,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "count",
                        title: "数量",
                        type: "singleRow",
                        render: ({target}) => {
                            return target.count === 5 ? {hover: true} : {hover: false};
                        },
                    },
                    {
                        name: "description",
                        title: "描述",
                        type: "description",
                    },
                    {
                        name: "description2",
                        title: "描述(省略)",
                        type: "description",
                        ellipsis: true,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "other",
                        title: "其他",
                        type: "other",
                        hover: true,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "options",
                        title: "操作",
                        type: "options",
                        valueOf: (item) => [
                            {
                                onClick: () => {
                                    return new Promise((resolve) => {
                                        setTimeout(() => {
                                            resolve();
                                        }, 1000);
                                    });
                                },
                                children: "分配Program及教练",
                            }
                        ],
                    },
                ]}
        />
    </div>;
};

render(<BaseExample/>);

`,
    scope: [{
    name: "remoteLoader",
    packageName: "@kne/remote-loader",

},{
    title: `JSX Props 稳定性与异常重建排查`,
    description: `module 固定为字符串，通过动态/稳定两组 JSX props 对照，观察远程组件在重渲染过程中的挂载与卸载行为。`,
    code: `const {createWithRemoteLoader} = remoteLoader;
const {useEffect, useMemo, useState} = React;

const LogNode = ({label}) => {
    useEffect(() => {
        console.log(\`[mount]\`);
        return () => {
            console.log('[unmount]');
        };
    }, []);

    return <span>{label}</span>;
};

const RemoteContent = createWithRemoteLoader({
    modules: ["components-core:Content"]
})(({remoteModules, titleSlot, list}) => {
    const [Content] = remoteModules;
    return <Content title={titleSlot} list={list}/>;
});

const BaseExample = () => {
    const [tick, setTick] = useState(0);

    useEffect(() => {
        const timer = setInterval(() => {
            setTick((current) => current + 1);
        }, 1200);

        return () => {
            clearInterval(timer);
        };
    }, []);

    const stableTitleSlot = useMemo(() => {
        return <LogNode label="stable-title-slot"/>;
    }, []);

    const unstableTitleSlot = <LogNode label={\`unstable-title-slot-\${tick}\`}/>;

    return <div>
        <RemoteContent
            titleSlot={unstableTitleSlot}
            list={[
                {
                    label: "动态 JSX（可能触发异常重建）",
                    content: <LogNode label={\`unstable-content-\${tick}\`}/>
                }
            ]}
        />

        <RemoteContent
            titleSlot={stableTitleSlot}
            list={[
                {
                    label: "稳定 JSX（用于对照）",
                    content: <LogNode label="stable-content"/>
                }
            ]}
        />
    </div>;
};

render(<BaseExample/>);

`,
    scope: [{

    component: component_1
}]
}]
